mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client_order WHERE cl_order_date = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client_delivery WHERE DATE(delivery_date) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND DATE(updated_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND DATE(updated_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(order_qty),0) FROM work_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(actual_qty),0) FROM production_result WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT wom.material_id, SUM(wom.required_qty) AS req, IFNULL(mi.total_qty, 0) AS avail FROM work_order_material wom LEFT JOIN ( SELECT material_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_qty FROM material_inventory -- 필요시 상태 필터: WHERE (is_discarded IS NULL OR is_discarded = 0) GROUP BY material_id ) mi ON mi.material_id = wom.material_id WHERE DATE(wom.created_at) = CURDATE() GROUP BY wom.material_id HAVING (req - avail) > 0 ) t

SELECT m.material_id AS materialId, m.material_name AS materialName, m.unit AS unit, t.req AS requiredQty, IFNULL(mi.total_qty,0) AS availableQty, GREATEST(t.req - IFNULL(mi.total_qty,0),0) AS shortageQty FROM ( SELECT material_id, SUM(required_qty) AS req FROM work_order_material WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) GROUP BY material_id ) t JOIN material m ON m.material_id = t.material_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT material_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_qty FROM material_inventory -- 필요시 상태 필터 추가 가능 GROUP BY material_id ) mi ON mi.material_id = t.material_id WHERE (t.req - IFNULL(mi.total_qty,0)) > 0 ORDER BY shortageQty DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT wo.order_id AS orderId, c.client_name AS clientName, p.product_name AS productName, DATE_FORMAT(co.cl_delivery_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dueDate, ROUND( IFNULL(SUM(pr.actual_qty),0) / NULLIF(SUM(wo.order_qty),0,1) * 100 ) AS progressPct FROM work_order_client_order wco JOIN client_order co ON co.cl_order_id = wco.cl_order_id JOIN work_order wo ON wo.order_id = wco.work_order_id JOIN client c ON c.client_id = co.client_id JOIN product p ON p.product_id = wo.product_id LEFT JOIN production_result pr ON pr.order_id = wo.order_id WHERE co.cl_delivery_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY wo.order_id, c.client_name, p.product_name, co.cl_delivery_date HAVING progressPct < 80 ORDER BY co.cl_delivery_date ASC, progressPct ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m-%d') AS ymd, SUM(order_qty) AS qty FROM work_order WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY ymd
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m-%d') AS ymd, SUM(actual_qty) AS qty FROM production_result WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY ymd
